ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft used for the flight */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the flight */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot */,
  "co_pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-pilot */,
  "flight_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight plan */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the flight */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Status of the flight */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_co_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_flight_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_plan_id") REFERENCES flight_plans ("flight_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "total_flying_hours" INTEGER /* Total flying hours of the aircraft */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "aircraft_status" TEXT /* Current status of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "pilot_name" TEXT /* Name of the pilot */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the pilot */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the pilot was certified */,
  "total_flying_hours" INTEGER /* Total flying hours of the pilot */,
  "pilot_status" TEXT /* Current status of the pilot */,
  "pilot_rank" TEXT /* Rank or position of the pilot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_plans" (
  "flight_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the flight plan */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* Departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport" TEXT /* Arrival airport */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "estimated_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration of the flight */,
  "fuel_requirements" REAL /* Fuel requirements for the flight */,
  "weather_forecast" TEXT /* Weather forecast for the flight plan */,
  "flight_plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the flight plan */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the flight plan */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the flight plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_plans_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_plans_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waypoints" (
  "waypoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waypoint */,
  "flight_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight plan the waypoint belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the waypoint */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the waypoint */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the waypoint */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the waypoint in the flight plan */,
  "waypoint_status" TEXT /* Status of the waypoint */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the waypoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waypoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waypoints_flight_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_plan_id") REFERENCES flight_plans ("flight_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "completed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_completed_by FOREIGN KEY ("completed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, maintenance, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the flight data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "flight_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight plan used for the simulation */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot conducting the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., training, testing) */,
  "simulation_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "simulation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the simulation */,
  "simulation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the simulation */,
  "simulation_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the simulation was performed */,
  "simulation_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the simulation results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_flight_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_plan_id") REFERENCES flight_plans ("flight_plan_id")
)
